alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an aminobenzene moiety.
alternative_parents.name: Aniline and substituted anilines

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing the sulfuric acid or a derivative thereof.
alternative_parents.name: Organic sulfuric acids and derivatives

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds comprising the diazonium functional group, with the general structure R-N=N+.
alternative_parents.name: Organic diazonium salts

alternative_parents.description: Amines having the nitrogen atom linked to exactly two hydrocarbyl groups.
alternative_parents.name: Secondary amines

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Organic compounds containing an oxide group.
alternative_parents.name: Organic oxides

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Organic compounds containing a sulfate ion.
class.name: Organic sulfate salts

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as diazonium sulfates. These are organic mixtures of diazonium salts and sulfate salts. They have the general structure (RN+2 )2(SO4)2- , R'N+2 H(SO4)-, where R and R' are organyl groups.

direct_parent.description: Organic mixtures of diazonium salts and sulfate salts. They have the general structure (RN+2 )2(SO4)2- , R'N+2 H(SO4)-, where R and R' are organyl groups.
direct_parent.name: Diazonium sulfates

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic mixtures of diazonium salts and sulfate salts. They have the general structure (RN+2 )2(SO4)2- , R'N+2 H(SO4)-, where R and R' are organyl groups.
subclass.name: Diazonium sulfates

superclass.description: Organic compounds consisting of an assembly of cations and anions.
superclass.name: Organic salts
